themeWords.meaning: descendant of Ammon; the Ammonite people

sentenceTheme: Ezekiel pronounces oracles of judgment against Ammon, Moab, Edom, and Philistia for their spiteful actions, declaring the LORD’s vengeance.

verses.text: The word of the LORD came again unto me, saying,

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Son of man, set thy face against the Ammonites, and prophesy against them;

highlightedWords.meaning: descendant of Ammon; the Ammonite people
to speak or sing by divine inspiration

verses.text: And say unto the Ammonites, Hear the word of the Lord GOD; Thus saith the Lord GOD; Because thou saidst, Aha, against my sanctuary, when it was profaned; and against the land of Israel, when it was desolate; and against the house of Judah, when they went into captivity;

highlightedWords.meaning: YHWH vocalized with Adonai; rendered GOD

verses.text: Behold, therefore I will deliver thee to the men of the east for a possession, and they shall set their palaces in thee, and make their dwellings in thee: they shall eat thy fruit, and they shall drink thy milk.
And I will make Rabbah a stable for camels, and the Ammonites a couchingplace for flocks: and ye shall know that I am the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel

verses.text: For thus saith the Lord GOD; Because thou hast clapped thine hands, and stamped with the feet, and rejoiced in heart with all thy despite against the land of Israel;

highlightedWords.meaning: YHWH vocalized with Adonai; rendered GOD

verses.text: Behold, therefore I will stretch out mine hand upon thee, and will deliver thee for a spoil to the heathen; and I will cut thee off from the people, and I will cause thee to perish out of the countries: I will destroy thee; and thou shalt know that I am the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Thus saith the Lord GOD; Because that Moab and Seir do say, Behold, the house of Judah is like unto all the heathen;

highlightedWords.meaning: nation east of the Dead Sea

verses.text: Therefore, behold, I will open the side of Moab from the cities, from his cities which are on his frontiers, the glory of the country, Beth-jeshimoth, Baal-meon, and Kiriathaim,

highlightedWords.meaning: nation east of the Dead Sea

verses.text: Unto the men of the east with the Ammonites will I give them in possession, that the Ammonites may not be remembered among the nations.

highlightedWords.meaning: descendant of Ammon; the Ammonite people

verses.text: And I will execute judgments upon Moab; and they shall know that I am the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: nation east of the Dead Sea
the personal name of the God of Israel

verses.text: Thus saith the Lord GOD; Because that Edom hath dealt against the house of Judah by taking vengeance, and hath greatly offended, and revenged himself upon them;

highlightedWords.meaning: Judah; the southern kingdom of Israel

verses.text: Therefore thus saith the Lord GOD; I will also stretch out mine hand upon Edom, and will cut off man and beast from it; and I will make it desolate from Teman; and they of Dedan shall fall by the sword.

And I will lay my vengeance upon Edom by the hand of my people Israel: and they shall do in Edom according to mine anger and according to my fury; and they shall know my vengeance, saith the Lord GOD.
Thus saith the Lord GOD; Because the Philistines have dealt by revenge, and have taken vengeance with a despiteful heart, to destroy it for the old hatred;

highlightedWords.meaning: Philistines; people of the coastal plain

verses.text: Therefore thus saith the Lord GOD; Behold, I will stretch out mine hand upon the Philistines, and I will cut off the Cherethims, and destroy the remnant of the sea coast.

highlightedWords.meaning: Philistines; people of the coastal plain

verses.text: And I will execute great vengeance upon them with furious rebukes; and they shall know that I am the LORD, when I shall lay my vengeance upon them.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of the God of Israel
